zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Aston於大約1480年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾福爾時，他的父親John Aston37歲，母親Elizabeth Delves33歲。他於大約1500年與Mrs Thomas Paston在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾福爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1551年被列為sheriff of cheshire。他去世於1551年8月7日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾可爾維其享年72歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Aston于大约1480年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾福爾时，他的父亲John Aston37岁，母亲Elizabeth Delves33岁。他于大约1500年与Mrs Thomas Paston在英国英格兰斯塔福爾福爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1551年被列为sheriff of cheshire。他去世于1551年8月7日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾可爾維其享年72岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Aston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Ad(e)stan, which is usually from Old English Æthelstān (see Alston ). It may also be from the much rarer Old English name Ēadstān.
habitational name from any of several places in England called Aston. Most were named with Old English ēast ‘east’ + tūn ‘settlement’. In a few cases the first element is æsc ‘ash tree’.

variants.name: Alston
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Alstan, which is a coalescence of several different Old English personal names: Æthelstān ‘noble stone’, Ælfstān ‘elf stone’, Ealdstān ‘old stone’, or Ealhstān ‘temple stone’.

habitational name from any of various places called Alston (in Cumbria, Lancashire, Devon, and Somerset) or Alstone (in Gloucestershire and Staffordshire). With the exception of Alston in Cumbria, which is formed with the Old Norse personal name Halfdan, these placenames all consist of an Old English personal name + Old English tūn ‘settlement’, for example Ælfsige in the case of Alstone in Gloucestershire.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Aston was born about 1480, in Fole, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Aston, was 37 and his mother, Elizabeth Delves, was 33. He married Mrs Thomas Paston about 1500, in Fole, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. In 1551, at the age of 72, his occupation is listed as sheriff of cheshire. He died on 7 August 1551, in Colwich, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, Unit: Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Aston est né environ 1480, à Fole, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Aston, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Delves, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Thomas Paston environ 1500, à Fole, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. En 1551, à l’âge de 72 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of cheshire. Il est décédé le 7 août 1551, à Colwich, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, Unit: Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Aston um 1480 in Fole, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Aston 37 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Delves 33. Er hat um 1500 in Fole, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs Thomas Paston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1551, als er 72 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of cheshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 7. August 1551 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Colwich, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Aston è nato il circa 1480 nel Fole, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Aston, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Delves, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Thomas Paston circa 1500, nel Fole, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Nel 1551, all'età di 72 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of cheshire. Morì il 7 agosto 1551, nel Colwich, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, Unit: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 애스턴 비 수턴
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Aston(이)가 대략 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 폴일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Aston(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Delves(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 폴일에서 Mrs Thomas Paston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1551년, 72세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of cheshire이었다. 그는 1551년 8월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 코위치에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Aston nasceu aproximadamente 1480, em Fole, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Aston, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Delves, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Thomas Paston aproximadamente 1500, em Fole, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Em 1551, com 72 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of cheshire. Ele faleceu em 7 de agosto de 1551, em Colwich, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, Unit: астон би суттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Aston родился около 1480 г. в местности фол, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Aston было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Delves, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Thomas Paston около 1500 г. в местности фол, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1551 году, в возрасте 72 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of cheshire. Он умер 7 августа 1551 г. в местности колвич, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Aston nació aproximadamente 1480, en Fole, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Aston, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Delves, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Mrs Thomas Paston aproximadamente 1500, en Fole, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. En 1551, a la edad de 72 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of cheshire. Murió el 7 de agosto de 1551, en Colwich, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
